ticket: I bought the Pro plan 5 days ago but realized I don't need that much storage. Can I get a refund?
answer: Sorry for the mix-up with your Pro upgrade. Since it's been under 30 days, I've gone ahead and processed your refund — you'll see it back on your original payment method within a few business days. — The Nimbus Team

ticket: I subscribed to Plus about three months ago and have barely used it. I'd like my money back.
answer: Thanks for reaching out, and sorry Plus hasn't been a fit. Because the purchase is past our 30-day refund window, I'm not able to issue a refund, but I'd be glad to add account credit you can put toward a future plan as a goodwill gesture. Want me to apply that? — The Nimbus Team

ticket: I think my account was hacked — there are files in here I don't recognize.
answer: That's understandably alarming, and I want to get it handled safely. I'm escalating this to our security team right away, and someone will follow up with you directly. In the meantime, please avoid sharing any account details. — The Nimbus Team

ticket: When are you going to add a dark mode?
answer: Appreciate you asking — a lot of people would love this. I've shared your request with our product team so it's on their radar. I can't promise a specific date, but it's the kind of feedback that helps them prioritize. — The Nimbus Team

ticket: I forgot my password. Can you reset it for me?
answer: Happy to point you the right way. For your account's security I can't reset it on my end, but you can set a new one in under a minute at nimbus.app/reset. — The Nimbus Team

ticket: How much storage do I get on the Plus plan?
answer: Good question — the Plus plan is $8/month and includes 200 GB of storage. If you need more room, Pro steps up to 2 TB. — The Nimbus Team

ticket: My uploads keep failing right at 90%.
answer: Sorry for the trouble — a stall near the end is usually a connection hiccup. Try uploading over a stable Wi-Fi connection, and if it's a large file, the web app tends to be more reliable than mobile. If it keeps happening, let me know the file size and I'll dig in. — The Nimbus Team

ticket: All my photos disappeared from my account this morning.
answer: I'm really sorry — missing files is exactly the kind of thing we treat seriously. I'm escalating this to our security team so they can investigate what happened to your data, and someone will be in touch shortly. — The Nimbus Team

ticket: I just got an email about a login from a country I've never been to.
answer: Thanks for flagging that quickly — it's the right instinct. I'm escalating this to our security team to review the activity on your account, and they'll follow up with next steps. — The Nimbus Team

ticket: Search has been broken for me. When's the fix coming?
answer: Sorry search has been letting you down. I've shared the issue with our product team so they can prioritize a fix. I can't give you a firm date, but flagging it the way you have genuinely helps. — The Nimbus Team

ticket: What does the Pro plan cost?
answer: Pro is $20/month and comes with 2 TB of storage — our largest plan. Let me know if you'd like a hand switching over. — The Nimbus Team

ticket: I got Plus last week and want to cancel and be refunded.
answer: No problem at all — since it's within our 30-day window, I've processed your refund and cancelled the Plus subscription. The amount should return to your original payment method shortly. — The Nimbus Team

ticket: Can you just send me a new password?
answer: I'd love to help you get back in. For security I can't send or set a password from my side, but you can create a fresh one right away at nimbus.app/reset. — The Nimbus Team

ticket: I've had Pro for six months and didn't use much of it. Can I get refunded for the unused time?
answer: Thanks for reaching out, and I hear you. Since the purchase is well past our 30-day refund window I can't issue a refund, but I can offer account credit toward a future plan as a goodwill gesture. Would that help? — The Nimbus Team
